This index lists document groups comprised of an Original and its reprints.

Isles of Mystery. Mementos of a Dead Past and an Extinct Race in the Pacific. The Channel Islands. Thoroughly Explored at Last by Professor Charles Frederick Holden. San Nicolas' Lone Woman. Remains That Tell of an Interesting Tribe of Aesthetic Tastes

Group ID: nyherald_mystery_islands • Total: 9

  • Original: "Isles of Mystery. Mementos of a Dead Past and an Extinct Race in the Pacific. The Channel Islands. Thoroughly Explored at Last by Professor Charles Frederick Holden. San Nicolas' Lone Woman. Remains That Tell of an Interesting Tribe of Aesthetic Tastes," New York Herald
  • Direct Reprint: "Isles of Mystery," Weekly Irish Times
  • Direct Reprint: "Isles of Mystery. Mementoes of an Extinct Race in the Pacific Ocean. Deserted Channel Islands. Thoroughly Explored at Last by Prof. Charles Fred Holden. San Nicolas' Lone Woman. Remains That Tell of an Interesting Tribe of Quite Aesthetic Tastes," Saint Paul (MN) Globe
  • Truncated Reprint: "The Islands of Mystery. Remains of a Giant Race," Rockhampton (AUS) Morning Bulletin
  • Truncated Reprint: "A Giant Race," Brisbane (AUS) Telegraph
  • Truncated Reprint: "The Islands of Mystery. Remains of a Giant Race," Maryborouogh (AUS) Chronicle, Wide Bay and Burnett Advertiser
  • Truncated Reprint: "A Giant Race," North Otago (NZL) Times
  • Truncated Reprint: "The Island of Mystery," Tokomairiro (NZL) Bruce Herald
  • Truncated Reprint: "The Island of Mystery," Katanning (AUS) Great Southern Herald

CollectionBuilder CSV

CollectionBuilder-CSV is a template for creating digital collection exhibits using static web technology.
